dualLens.label: Autonomous surgery · FDA breakthrough device
dualLens.headline: See the difference precision makes
dualLens.hint: Drag the lens to compare approaches

modules.title: Sub-millimeter robotic arms
modules.description: Seven-axis manipulators filter hand tremor at 1 kHz — holding steady at 0.1 mm accuracy through hours-long procedures that exceed human endurance.
modules.alt: Precision robotic surgical arm in operating theater

modules.title: AR anatomical overlay
modules.description: Real-time CT and MRI fusion projects vessel maps and tumor margins directly onto the surgical field — letting surgeons see through tissue without opening wider.
modules.alt: Surgeon using augmented reality overlay during operation

modules.title: Force-feedback haptics
modules.description: Bidirectional haptic loops translate tissue resistance back to the surgeon's grip — restoring the tactile cues lost in pure teleoperation or robotic intermediation.
modules.alt: Haptic feedback controller for surgical robotics

modules.title: AI tissue segmentation
modules.description: On-device vision models delineate nerves, vessels, and malignancy boundaries frame-by-frame — highlighting critical structures the naked eye can miss under blood and glare.
modules.alt: AI highlighting tissue boundaries on surgical display

modules.title: Ultra-low latency telesurgery
modules.description: Edge-compressed video and haptic streams traverse dedicated 5G slices at sub-20 ms round-trip — enabling specialist surgeons to operate across continents in real time.
modules.alt: Remote telesurgery console connected to operating room
